transcript.text:
[All-You-Can-Eat Lamb Meat?]
[Emergency]
[Hello...]
[A lady with a big appetite]
It's good
[She likes them...]
[Something's wrong...]
[This isn't right...]
[Cans after cans]
[All-You-Can-Eat Mukbang... Starting now...]
[Where are we at today?]
Hello everyone
I'm at Hwanghak-dong today
I've been into lamb bbq lately
Which is why I'm here today
This place has great reviews online

And!
It's All-You-Can-Eat Even sausages
Let's go crush it
Ta-da Over here
[New Town Sang Yang Gogi] [Seoul, Jung-gu]
I can already smell the deliciousness
Hello!
[Menu]
These are AYCE
Lamb meats, abomasum, shrimp, sausage, rice cake, There's a lot
I will focus on the lamb chops today
7 lamb chops
Wait... 8
That's 3 servings
No no no
8 orders of the 26,000 ones

[Say what now?!]
[Shocked]
-8 servings? -Yes, 8 servings
Can you even eat that much?
I'll be okay
Where does that all go to?
And also 1 AYCE
[But you already ordered 8 servings of lamb chops?]
I won't eat that much
Of course you can't After 8 servings of that
[She's very confused]
She's really shocked
This doesn't happen that often anymore
This is Himalayan pink salt
Thank you
I don't think you can finish it

[Let's count]
20 of them
You've exceeded the 90g limit
You can have more after
Thank you
Bon appetit
-Can you give me the AYCE orders as well? -Of course
1 plate for now
Look at the thickness It's thick
I can grill 5 of them 4 times
Tasty
Can't forget the zha cai (pickled veggies)
This is like a Chinese version of Kimchi
They know what they're doing if their zha cai tastes good
Thank you
This much?

Great portion size
How many grams is this?
Over 400 grams
So a total of 3kgs? Thank you
Rice cakes and sausages too
This is going to be great
I'm going to cut it now because I have no patience
Look how meaty this is
Is it this tender or are the scissors really sharp?
I'm going to send it to my son
-Can I eat it cooked rare? -Yes you can
Like steka
Bon appetit
One that's cooked well first
With a little bit of salt
Look how juicy it is

That's good
I don't think this will work
Fire!
Really Take a look at this
The juiciness is crazy And so is the texture and the smell
So delicious
This is top notch
So good
This is medium rare and it's just like beef
Some cumin too
It's good with just salt too
The quality is so good that cooked medium is perfect
The meat juice is really insane
I'm loving the lamb meat taste
So good
Cooked as a whole

Look at this
As a whole
Nicely cooked inside
With some cumin
Really good
It's cooked well
I'm going to cook more while I eat this
Now I know why they have good reviews It's really tasty
I've never seen an AYCE lamb chop restaurant before
With chives and seasoning paste
I've had some lamb chops by myself near my house
Had like 60 pieces and mala soup
And they asked me if I was okay The people were very worried
I want to ask if I can have these scissors
I like it cooked medium
It's so good

It's great with salt Is it because it's high-quality?
1 combination that I haven't tried
I want to try it with wasabi It'd be good, right?
Cumin
Some chives on top this time
That was the best bite so far
I just had a piece that was cooked medium-rare And it was so good
I just love how lamb tastes
Cooked rice cake
Skewer
Sausage and lamb
Lamb and rice cake...
Wait, you're right
It's lamb and rice cake
Sausage here
Sausage lamb rice cake

It's good
Rice cake and lamb go well together
Thank you
Let's eat it from the ribs
It's cooked
Yummy
It's cooked so well
Another one
The drinks are on me
Wow, thank you!
It's hot
Let's cook this too
These are AYCE lamb meat
A lot of pieces
Let's cook the sausages and rice cakes too
Shrimp too

That looks scrumptious
Wasabi here
[She said she wanted to try it together]
Not that good
Coke
You can charge the drinks
Because I drink a lot too
This is the shoulder meat
That's so good!
I love the ribs, but I like all lamb meat
That's delicious You're saying these are AYCE?
The quality is really nice
So good
It's a perfect place for those who love lamb meat
Gopchang (small intestines)
This is good too

Soft and no gamey smell
These are great
Let's peel the shrimp
Really tasty
Shrimp tastes good too
Making a skewer at a lamb restaurant
So good
I love AYCE
Sausage and rice cake skewer, gopchang, and even shrimp are delicious
I try not to eat at AYCE places because I feel bad
But I would love to come here again
Ma'am...?
1 customer like myself per day is enough, right?
Has anyone eaten this much before?
No?
Wasabi on top

Last plate of ribs
Can I purchase these scissors from you?
-You can just keep that one if you'd like -No no no
It cuts so well
How can raw meat get cut this easily?
She's good at grilling
Well I have to because I eat a lot
I have a lot of experience
I feel good now because she said I can grill well
Lamb chops are good because it's greasy
The leg part is not as fatty
I love this because I like greasy meat
The more greasy it is, the better it goes with wasabi
Really good
If I don't say anything, it means that the food is good
1 last bite
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
